arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka blames Arsenal team-mate for denying him first Arsenal hat-trick
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka scored twice in Arsenal's 3-0 Champions League win against Monaco at the Emirates but one of his own teammates saw him robbed of his first-ever hattrick for the club

arts.ttl: Free-flowing Arsenal back to their best in statement Champions League win to bust set-piece myth
arts.sum: Gunners are on course to skip the Champions League play-offs

arts.ttl: Arsenal investigating kit man after complaint over antisemitic posts on social media
arts.sum: An account on X, formerly known as Twitter, that allegedly belonged to Arsenal kit man Mark Bonnick shared a series of antisemitic posts and has led to an investigation

arts.ttl: Arsenal's set-piece maestro Nicolas Jover is honoured with mural outside the Emirates - but rival fans mock the painting as 'embarrassing'
arts.sum: Arsenal 's much-hailed set-piece coach Nicolas Jover has been memorialised by club supporters with his own mural being created outside the Emirates in honour of the effect he has had on the club.

arts.ttl: Saka inspires Arsenal to beat Monaco and boost automatic qualification hopes
arts.athr: David Hytner at the Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: It would normally be over by now, the Champions League group stage done and dusted and yet there are still two more ties for Arsenal; a test of their physicality, the depth of their reserves as well as their resolve. The idea is to play the extra games in January and make sure they do not have to play two more in the playoff round in February; to zoom straight into the round of 16. It continues to look pretty good. This was the toughest tie Arsenal had left in the elongated group phase and Mikel Arteta had wanted to make it count. His team did exactly that. Bukayo Saka brought the cutting edge, his opening goal aided and abetted by Myles Lewis-Skelly, assured on a full debut at this rarefied level. When Saka scored his second, it was to kill off a Monaco revival that probably should not have been possible. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'I just said to him': Saka shares what pre-match advice he gave Lewis-Skelly before his Arsenal heroics v Monaco
arts.sum: Arsenal academy graduate Myles Lewis-Skelly had a night to remember on Wednesday as he shone on his full Champions League debut against Monaco. At 18...

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka brilliance vs Monaco sees Arsenal star claim Mo Salah role for Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: ARSENAL 3-0 MONACO: Mikel Arteta's side have taken a significant step towards the knockout rounds of the Champions League following a stunning performance from Bukayo Saka

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-0 Monaco: Match report and talking points as Gunners edge closer to Champions League last 16
arts.sum: Match report and talking points from Arsenal's Champions League clash with Monaco.

arts.ttl: I saw Arteta do something for the first time at Arsenal in 3-0 win vs Monaco & he may keep doing it (opinion)
arts.sum: The Spaniard might keep doing it 🤔

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-0 Monaco PLAYER RATINGS: Which Gunners star put in a 'proper shift' in midfield? Who had a frustrating evening? And which star stepped up when it mattered?
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES: Mikel Arteta's side started brightly and could've been ahead through Martin Odegaard and Gabriel Jesus, who both squandered glorious chances.
